milestones.title: Docs Alignment
milestones.summary: Establish the V3 archetype design as the authoritative project direction. Archive superseded V2 design and legacy XML‑builder docs.

items.title: M0: Docs Alignment

milestones.title: Archetype Framework Skeleton
milestones.summary: Add the framework before adding real integration patterns: base classes, registry discovery, parameter schemas, and the first three MCP authoring tools.

M1.2 Add pattern registry discovery

M1.4 Add MCP authoring tools

M1.6 Update capability/schema discoverability

milestones.title: database_to_api_sync Vertical Slice
milestones.summary: End‑to‑end archetype for scheduled DB extraction into a REST API target. Includes DB & REST builders, profiles/maps, transform escalation ladder, process orchestration and operational primitives (retry, DLQ, watermarks, run metadata).

milestones.title: Deploy and Test Orchestration
milestones.summary: One‑call deploy/test path: package, deploy, attach runtime, schedule, execute, monitor. Idempotent retries; structured failure diagnostics.

items.title: M3: Deploy and Test Orchestration
M3.1 Add orchestrate_deploy contract and build-result resolver
M3.2 Add idempotent package creation and deployment stage
M3.3 Add runtime attachment and schedule activation stage
M3.4 Add optional test execution, polling, and log summary stage
M3.5 Compose and register orchestrate_deploy MCP tool
M3.6 Harden orchestration failures, idempotency, and cleanup planning
M3.7 Live QA orchestrate_deploy against M2 archetype output
M3.R1 Verified Try/Catch + DLQ process emission (un-gate retry_count / DLQ)

milestones.title: Agent Ergonomics
milestones.summary: Make the authoring flow self-discoverable for a cold LLM client: structured error taxonomy, workflow hints, schema access, anti-template examples, and Companion-informed operating doctrine around profile-first routing, typed tools, bounded experimentation, and behavioral verification.

items.title: M4: Agent Ergonomics

milestones.title: Design Doctrine and Reliability
milestones.summary: Harden the authoring path toward production-pattern reliability: a design-doctrine knowledge surface, archetype DLQ and Try/Catch reconciliation with verified builder modes, un-gated bounded retry backed by live retryCount evidence, verified Notify and standalone Process Call/facade emission, environment-extension declarations for connection fields, account governance, and a live-QA capstone — plus a stretch read-only design-brief assembler.

M4.5.1 Add integration design doctrine knowledge surface (design_doctrine)
M4.5.2 Align archetype DLQ contract with verified builder modes and wire Try/Catch+DLQ through database_to_api_sync
M4.5.3 Un-gate bounded retry (R1b): live retryCount evidence and RetryPolicy contract reconciliation
M4.5.4 Add verified Notify step emission for catch paths
M4.5.5 Add verified standalone Process Call and wrapper-parent (facade) emission
M4.5.6 Live QA capstone: production-pattern reference build on minimal connectors
M4.5.7 Emit environment-extension declarations for connection fields
M4.5.8 Add account_governance knowledge surface (folder/naming/role governance)
M4.5.9 (stretch) plan_integration_design read-only design-brief assembler

milestones.title: API Variants
milestones.summary: Generalize the scheduled sync core into a verified sync_pipeline: a PipelineSpec stage model with a semantic validator, with database_to_api_sync preserved as an adapter over it. Add a REST fetch/source primitive, database write support, and inner‑object preservation hardening, then ship api_to_api_sync and api_to_database_sync presets with live QA.

M5.0 Update design docs and issue DAG for semantic sync pipeline
M5.1 Add PipelineSpec stage model and semantic validator
M5.2 Add sync_pipeline process builder for verified linear flows
M5.3 Preserve database_to_api_sync as adapter over sync_pipeline
M5.4 Add REST fetch/source primitive
M5.4a Add typed REST runtime binding model for connector step dynamicProperties
M5.5 Complete preservation hardening and REST conditional emission
M5.6 Add database Send/write operation and write profile support
M5.7 Add api_to_api_sync preset over sync_pipeline
M5.8 Add api_to_database_sync preset over sync_pipeline
M5.9 Live QA for sync_pipeline presets
M5.10 Add Web Services SOAP Client connector support

milestones.title: Event and Listener Variants
milestones.summary: Event-based integrations after scheduled syncs are stable: HTTP listener source primitive, listener archetypes (HTTP->DB, HTTP->REST), inbound validation, listener deploy/start/verify, API-tier preflight, route-collision checks, and listener-specific runtime invariants.

items.title: M6: Event and Listener Variants
M6.1 Add API Service (webservice) component support to all layers

milestones.summary: Read-only discovery for source and target facts: OpenAPI, SOAP WSDL, OData metadata, DB schema, profile inference, migration drafts, reusable live connection suggestions, and Boomi Marketplace recipe search for reference patterns.

milestones.title: Archetype Composition
milestones.summary: Compose stable standalone archetypes into larger integrations with contract validation between parts. Composed output deploys and tests through normal orchestration.

items.title: M8: Archetype Composition

milestones.title: Operational Knowledge and Guardrails
milestones.summary: Adopt Boomi Companion's medium-agnostic knowledge and control artifacts into the MCP: operational gotcha search, symptom routing, raw API write guards, process graph verification, behavior-verified deploy semantics, and builder invariant locking while preserving typed JSON-to-XML builders.

M9.2 Route troubleshooting symptoms through the gotcha catalog
M9.3 Gate invoke_boomi_api writes behind confirm_write
M9.4 Add process-graph integrity verification to build_integration verify
M9.5 Add require_test_logs and behavior-verified marker to orchestrate_deploy
M9.6 Audit and lock builder XML invariants from the Companion catalog
M9.7 Add safe existing-component edit workflow: pull -> structured patch -> diff -> push
M9.8 Enforce integration-build basics as mechanical builder guards (connection dedup, extensions, naming, graph/shape lints)

milestones.title: : Process Shape Coverage
milestones.summary: Close the process-shape coverage gap so the builder can emit the non-connector shapes real integrations actually use, grounded in a census of all 85 live processes: Data Process, Return Documents, Exception/Throw, Document Cache retrieve/remove, Flow Control, Branch, and Decision (with loops). Each shape ships as one PR spanning emitter, graph verifier, spec, protocol, patterns, doctrine, and byte-exact golden-XML tests, with a doctrine→emitter consistency guard keeping the set self-policing. Sequenced before the rest of M5 while still attaching to its sync_pipeline seam; unblocks M8 (Branch).

items.title: M10: Close process-shape coverage gaps
M10.0 Add control-flow edge contract to PipelineSpec (typed edges + cycle classification)
M10.1 Add doctrine->emitter consistency test for emittable shapes
M10.2 Add Data Process shape coverage (standalone, process-level)
M10.2a Add Data Process Split/Combine Documents operations
M10.3 Add Return Documents shape coverage
M10.4 Add Exception / Throw shape coverage
M10.5 Add Document Cache Retrieve shape coverage
M10.6 Add Document Cache Remove shape coverage
M10.7 Add Flow Control shape coverage
M10.8 Add Branch shape coverage (N-way fan-out)
M10.9 Add Decision shape coverage (conditional edges) + loops

milestones.title: : Cache + Dynamic Properties Authoring
milestones.summary: Promote Document Cache and Dynamic Properties from raw process shapes into first-class authoring intents, grounded in a full census of how live integrations use them. Adds an authoring vocabulary for cache, property, and enrichment intents; generalizes Dynamic Document Properties and adds Dynamic Process Properties (Set Properties) support; and ships semantic Document Cache put/get/join authoring. Lineage, scope, and cardinality validation keep cache and property flows sound, with research evidence wired into the planner and design surfaces and cross-branch composed examples, fixtures, and live QA proving it end-to-end.

items.title: M11: Promote Document Cache + Dynamic Properties into authoring layer
M11.0 Full cache/property usage census and design rationale
M11.1 Add authoring vocabulary for cache/property/enrichment intents
M11.2 Generalize DDP and add DPP Set Properties support
M11.3 Add semantic Document Cache put/get/join authoring
M11.4 Add cache/property lineage, scope, and cardinality validation
M11.5 Wire research evidence into planner/design surfaces
M11.6 Cross-branch composed examples, fixtures, and live QA
M11.7 Add a Process Property (processproperty) component builder to all layers

milestones.title: : Canonical Integration Authoring IR and Process Compiler Consolidation
milestones.summary: Collapse the overlapping process representations — flow_sequence, PipelineSpec, archetype slots and composition parts — into one strict, versioned ProcessIRV1: a typed authoring AST over a compiler-owned control-flow graph. IntegrationSpecV1 stays the component materialization plan, legacy inputs become adapters held to golden parity, and new capability lands only in the IR. Adds a verified process-emitter registry, first-class ConnectorCall with mixed linear flow, rich Branch and Decision bodies, scoped error handling with retry/idempotency safety, semantic validation unified on the IR, capability-gated SystemTopologySpecV1 planning, and typed executable recipes — then migrates the MCP authoring, planning, compile and verify surfaces onto it with live QA.

items.title: M12: Canonical Integration Authoring IR and Process Compiler Consolidation
M12.0 — Architecture ADR and compatibility invariants
M12.1 — Promote flow_sequence into strict ProcessIRV1 models
M12.2 — Add compiler-owned internal CFG and lowering contracts
M12.3 — Extract a verified process-emitter registry
M12.4 — Add legacy adapters and golden parity
M12.5 — Add first-class ConnectorCall and mixed linear flow
M12.6 — Add rich Branch and Decision bodies
M12.7 — Add scoped error handling and retry/idempotency safety
M12.8 — Unify semantic validation on ProcessIRV1
M12.9 — Add capability-gated SystemTopologySpecV1 planning
M12.10 — Add typed executable recipe contributions
M12.11 — Update MCP authoring, planning, compile, and verify surfaces
M12.12 — Complete migration, documentation, examples, and live QA
